Compare our best unlimited cell phone plans.

Get value that lasts by getting built-in benefits. And on our Experience plans, your price is guaranteed for 5 years.

Price guarantee on talk, text, and data; exclusions like taxes and fees apply. 

T-Mobile customers had the lowest wireless bills vs. Verizon and AT&T over the past 5 years.

Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots.

Popular plans unlock better device offers than discounted plans.

  • Experience Beyond

    Most value + best phone deals
    original price /month sale price /month

    + taxes and fees

    + up to $35 device connection charge per line

    AutoPay discount using an eligible payment method applied

    Our best plan with the best benefits in wireless. Option to upgrade your phone every year with the same great deals new T-Mobile customers get.

    • 5-Year Price Guarantee 5 Legal footnote
    • Upgrade every year with the same great deals as new customers
    • T-Satellite included 4 Legal footnote
    • Unlimited premium data on the Best Mobile Network 1 Legal footnote
    • Netflix™ Standard with ads ON US
    • Apple TV just $3/month
    • Hulu ON US
    • Watch & tablet lines just $5/month 3 Legal footnote
    • Unlimited mobile hotspot included 6 Legal footnote
    • Unlimited text, 30GB of high-speed data in Canada & Mexico
    • Unlimited text, 15GB of high-speed data in 215+ countries & destinations
    • Up to 4K UHD video streaming 2 Legal footnote

    Compare all benefits

    Broadband Facts and fees Mobile Broadband Consumer Disclosure

    Monthly Price

    • 1 line $105
    • 2 lines $180
    • 3 lines $230
    • 4 lines $280
    • 5 lines $330
    Additional Lines
    • 6-8 Lines $50 / line
    • 9-12 Lines $55 / line

    This monthly price is not an introductory rate and does not require a yearly contract.

    Does not include AutoPay or other discounts.

    Additional Charges & Terms

    Provider monthly fees
    • Regulatory programs / Telco recovery fee $4.49/line

    • Federal & Local Surcharges
      (periodically set by gov. & vary by location)

       Typically
      $0.36-4.79/line
    One-time fees
    • Device connection charge $35/line
    Early termination fee $0
    Government taxes Varies by location

    Discounts & Bundles

    There may be additional billing discounts available.

    Speeds Provided with Plan

    • Typical Download Speed 144-561 Mbps (5G)
    • Typical Upload Speed 6-34 Mbps (5G)
    • Typical Latency 15-27 ms
    Data Included with Monthly Price Unlimited
    • Charges for Additional Data Usage $0
    Network Management Policy
     
    Privacy Policy

    Customer Support

    Contact Us

    From your T-Mobile phone: 611

    Call: 1-800-937-8997

    You will be charged a monthly Regulatory Programs ('RPF') & Telco Recovery Fee ('TRF') (not a government required tax or charge) totaling $4.49 for Voice Lines and $2.10 for Mobile Internet lines ('MI') (subject to change without notice; plus tax). Of the $4.49 total charge for voice lines, $0.50 is applied to the RPF and $3.99 is applied to the TRF. For MI lines $0.12 is applied to the RPF and $1.98 is applied to the TRF. These fees help recover costs T-Mobile incurs to provide service and may not apply to certain data devices/services.

    Learn more about the terms used on this label by visiting the Federal Communications Commission's Consumer Resource Center. fcc.gov/consumers

    Unique plan identifier: M0006945950PPI0000000000412

    Early termination fee $0
    Government taxes Varies by location

    Discounts & Bundles

    There may be additional billing discounts available.

    Speeds Provided with Plan

    • Typical Download Speed 144-561 Mbps (5G)
    • Typical Upload Speed 6-34 Mbps (5G)
    • Typical Latency 15-27 ms
    Data Included with Monthly Price Unlimited
    • Charges for Additional Data Usage $0
    Network Management Policy
     
    Privacy Policy

    Customer Support

    Contact Us

    From your T-Mobile phone: 611

    Call: 1-800-937-8997

    You will be charged a monthly Regulatory Programs ('RPF') & Telco Recovery Fee ('TRF') (not a government required tax or charge) totaling $4.49 for Voice Lines and $2.10 for Mobile Internet lines ('MI') (subject to change without notice; plus tax). Of the $4.49 total charge for voice lines, $0.50 is applied to the RPF and $3.99 is applied to the TRF. For MI lines $0.12 is applied to the RPF and $1.98 is applied to the TRF. These fees help recover costs T-Mobile incurs to provide service and may not apply to certain data devices/services.

    Learn more about the terms used on this label by visiting the Federal Communications Commission's Consumer Resource Center. fcc.gov/consumers

    Unique plan identifier: M0006945950PPI0000000000407

    You will be charged a monthly Regulatory Programs ('RPF') & Telco Recovery Fee ('TRF') (not a government required tax or charge) totaling $4.49 for Voice Lines and $2.10 for Mobile Internet lines ('MI') (subject to change without notice; plus tax). Of the $4.49 total charge for voice lines, $0.50 is applied to the RPF and $3.99 is applied to the TRF. For MI lines $0.12 is applied to the RPF and $1.98 is applied to the TRF. These fees help recover costs T-Mobile incurs to provide service and may not apply to certain data devices/services.

    Learn more about the terms used on this label by visiting the Federal Communications Commission's Consumer Resource Center. fcc.gov/consumers

    Unique plan identifier: M0006945950PPI0000000000413

    • Netflix™ Standard with ads ON US

    • Unlimited text, 30GB of high-speed data in Canada & Mexico

    • Up to 4K UHD video streaming 2 Legal footnote

    Unique plan identifier: M0006945950PPI0000000000372

Annual estimated savings

1Essentials customers may notice speeds lower than other customers and further reduction if using >50GB/month., due to data prioritization. Video typically streams on smartphone/tablet in SD quality; Experience More, or Experience Beyond plan activate up to 4K UHD streaming on capable device, or video typically streams in SD. Experience Beyond: Qualifying new financed device & on Experience Beyond plan required. Upgrade qualifying device in good condition after 6+ months with 50% paid off; upgrade ends current financing & any promo credits. Not combinable with some offers.

25G: Coverage not available in some areas. Some uses may require certain plan or feature; see 5G device, coverage, & access details at T-Mobile.com.

3$5/month. price via monthly bill credit while you maintain a qualifying Experience Beyond.

4 Texting & select satellite-ready apps with compatible device in most outdoor areas in the U.S. where you can see the sky. Satellite service, including text to 911, may be delayed, limited, or unavailable. Included with Experience Beyond plans or $10/mo.; auto renews monthly. Cancel anytime in T-Life App. See more details here

55 Year Price Guarantee: Applies to monthly price for on-network talk, text, and 5G data. Exclusions like taxes & fees apply.

6High-speed mobile hotspot data: After 250GB of premium data, unlimited data at max 3G speeds.

Eligible low-income California residents may qualify for FREE LifeLine Service and a smartphone through Assurance Wireless. For full details visit assurancewireless.com/affordable. Rest. Apply.

7Best Mobile Network in the U.S. on analysis by Ookla® of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission.

Plan prices shown include AutoPay and paper-free billing discounts; pricing excludes taxes, surcharges, and fees, which vary by carrier and location. Savings vs. comparable plans at AT&T and Verizon plus the costs of optional benefits; plan features and taxes & fees vary. Savings with 3+ lines include 3rd line free via monthly bill credits; credits stop if you cancel any lines. Qualifying credit required. See T-Mobile.com/plans for full T-Mobile pricing and plan details.

Savings vs. comparable plans at AT&T and Verizon plus the costs of optional benefits; plan features and taxes & fees vary. Savings with 3+ lines include 3rd line free via mo. bill credits; credits stop if you cancel any lines. Qualifying credit req’d. 5-Year Price Guarantee means we won’t change the price of talk, text, and 5G smartphone data on our network for at least 5 years as long as you are on an Experience plan. Guarantee also applies to price for data on wearable/tablet/mobile internet lines added to your plan. Your guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn’t restart if you add a line or change plans after that. Taxes & fees, per-use charges, plan add-ons, third-party services, and network management practices aren’t included.

Ready to switch to T-Mobile?

Switch in just 15 minutes.

Join how and when you want—right here or in the T-Life app.

No trade-in needed to join the best network.

Keep your phone or score a great deal on a new one when you activate a line. Explore deals.

FREE same-day delivery.

For a limited time, get your new phone, 5G Home Internet, or both delivered for FREE the same day you switch. Check availability at checkout.

Best Mobile Network in the US according to Ookla® Speedtest®. 

Switch in just 15 minutes.

Check out in 15 minutes or less per line. Median check-out time using T-Life app; activation may take longer (e.g., with locked phones). Device activation, data & number transfer will take additional time.

Free Same-Day Delivery

Free Same-Day Delivery: Phone delivery for eligible new accounts. Home Internet delivery for new and existing customers activating an eligible new Home Internet line. For both, see if same-day delivery is an option during checkout. Plus tax. Same-day delivery is not available in all areas and may not be available due to order cutoff times. Weather, traffic, driver availability and safety, and other uncontrollable conditions may affect delivery window.

According to Ookla® Speedtest®. Best: Based on analysis by Ookla® of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission. Fastest: Based on analysis by Ookla® of Speedtest Intelligence® data of national Speed Score results incorporating 5G download and upload speeds for 2H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission.

Got questions?

  • New and existing accounts on an Experience postpaid voice plan can rest assured that the price of talk, text and data won’t change for at least 5 years as long as you are on an Experience plan. The guarantee also applies to price for data on wearable/tablet/mobile internet lines added to your plan. Your guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn’t restart if you add a line or change plans after that. Taxes & fees, per-use charges, plan add-ons, third-party services (e.g. streaming services, international data and satellite services) and network management practices aren’t included.

  • Yes, T-Satellite is included on us with Experience Beyond and Go5G Next plans. Customers on other plans can add the service for a limited time at $10/month (a savings of $5/mo.), per line. Learn more at https://www.t-mobile.com/coverage/satellite-phone-service.

  • Your guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and we won’t change the price of talk, text and 5G smartphone data on our network for at least five years, as long as you are on an Experience plan. Adding or changing to a different Experience plan doesn’t restart the 5-year period.

  • Most unlimited plans give you an amount of data at the start of your bill cycle where you are prioritized higher than customers who are heavy data users. This data is called Premium Data. Once you have used that data, you are prioritized lower than other customers and you may notice lower speeds in times and places with network congestion. All of our new Experience plans include unlimited premium data, including Experience Beyond and Experience More with 55+/First Responder and Military Savings plans. T-Mobile has been awarded the Best Mobile Network in the U.S based on analysis by Ookla of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025.

  • Our Experience plans have benefits that give you the freedom to upgrade when you want. Upgrade as early as every year with Experience Beyond or be upgrade-ready every two years with Experience More. This is unlike AT&T and Verizon, who quietly increased device contracts from two years to three—with no shorter option if you want their best phone deal.

  • With Experience Beyond, you’ll automatically become eligible for a yearly upgrade.

    1. Purchase a new phone with any eligible promotion on T-Mobile’s no-interest phone payment plan (EIP) via 24 monthly bill credits plus tax and keep it active on an Experience Beyond plan for at least six months.

    2. Once half of your phone is paid off, you can trade in your device in good working condition. Then T-Mobile will cover the remaining half of your device cost so you're ready to upgrade.

    3. Your yearly upgrade benefit allows you to take advantage of any eligible in-market phone promotions. You’re guaranteed the same great phone deals as a new T-Mobile Experience Beyond customer.

      For example, if you purchase a $1,000 smartphone with Experience Beyond, you can trade it in toward a new one once you pay half ($500) and it's past 6 months. T-Mobile covers the remaining $500 on the old phone. New T-Mobile customers and existing customers on Experience Beyond always get the same great deals when they’re ready to upgrade.

    Experience More

    With Experience More, you will automatically become eligible for an upgrade every two years by taking advantage of any eligible in-market phone promotions.

    1. Purchase a new phone with any eligible promotion on T-Mobile’s no-interest phone payment plan (EIP) via 24 monthly bill credits plus tax and keep it active on an Experience More plan.

    2. After two years, you're ready to upgrade and can take advantage of any eligible in-market phone promotions. New T-Mobile customers and existing customers on Experience More always get the same great phone deals when they’re ready to upgrade.

  • Existing customers on qualifying plans always get the same great device deals as new customers switching to T-Mobile on those plans. This is a promise, not a limited-time offer. So whether you’re just joining T-Mobile or have been with us for years, you’ll have access to the same great phone deals now and in the future when you’re ready to upgrade. It’s the fair treatment you can count on from T-Mobile.

  • All our phone plans include unlimited talk, text, and data on our 5G network and ultra-fast speeds with Ultra Capacity 5G. Check out our 5G coverage map  to see if 5G is available in your area.

    • Netflix ON US
      Netflix Standard with ads is included at no additional cost on the following plans: Experience Beyond, Experience More™, including Experience Beyond or More with 55+/First Responder/Military Savings. Get more details at www.t-mobile.com/tv-streaming/netflix-on-us

    • Apple TV just $3/month
      Experience Beyond, Experience More™, including Experience Beyond or More with 55+/First Responder/Military Savings get Apple TV included at no additional cost as a plan benefit (up to $9.99 per month value). Get more details at www.t-mobile.com/tv-streaming/apple-tv-plus-deal

    • Hulu (with Ads) ON US
      Customers on Experience Beyond plans will be eligible for Hulu (With Ads) on us. Get more details at www.t-mobile.com/tv-streaming/hulu-on-us-deal

  • To qualify for a free or discounted voice line, you must:

    • Activate a new account with at least three voice lines on an eligible rate plan:
      • 3rd Line Free: Essentials™, Experience More or Experience Beyond.
         
    • The bill credit will be applied monthly to the eligible line.

    • Your new lines must remain active to continue receiving bill credits.

    • A maximum of one free or discounted voice line may be added per account for this promotion.

  • You can keep the promotional pricing as long as you maintain an eligible rate plan with a minimum of three active lines.

  • Yes, you may combine this offer with most other promotions, including device promotions, Family Freedom, and Keep and Switch. Talk to us to ensure you meet the requirements for both promotions. This promotion cannot be combined with other free or discounted voice line offers, and 55+, Military & Veteran, and First Responder discounted plans.

  • No, this promotion is only available with qualifying regular-rate voice plans.

  • Yes, your free line must be a voice line. Other line types are not eligible for this promotion.

  • This offer has a maximum of one free or discounted voice line per account.

  • You’re never required to use AutoPay, but you’ll get a monthly discount on select voice plans if you sign up for AutoPay with an eligible payment method. AutoPay is not required to receive the promotion.

  • T-Mobile offers a range of affordable cell phone plans built to fit different customer needs. Try comparing our plans to find the best value for you as they’ll vary depending on factors like the number of lines, discounts you may be eligible for, and built-in value like streaming services and device upgrades.Also, being a T-Mobile customer means getting access to Magenta Status from day one—which, on top of value-packed plans and industry-leading benefits, gives customers access to one-of-a-kind perks and wireless powered by America’s Best Mobile Network as supported by Ookla® Speedtest®.

  • Yes! All of our plans offer single-line options with great benefits tailored to how you want to live and stay connected. Try comparing our plans to find the best fit.

  • T-Mobile offers a variety of family mobile plans packed with value—including unlimited data, exclusive perks with streaming, entertainment, travel, and more. The more lines you add, the more you save, making it simple and affordable for your whole family to stay connected. Explore and compare our family plans to find the one that best suits your needs.

  • T-Mobile offers a variety of deals for both new and existing customers. Check out our latest deals to find out how you can save today.

AutoPay discounts

When you enroll in AutoPay using your debit card or bank account, you qualify for a $5 per line monthly discount up to $40, which begins in the next bill cycle after enrollment.

Ways to qualify for the discount

  • Use a debit card at checkout
  • Before your first bill, change your payment method to a debit card or bank account in AutoPay setting.

Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots from Q3 ’21–Q4 ’25 compared to average AT&T and Verizon bills. Comparison exclude discounts, credits, and optional charges. For more details, visit harrisx.com/T-Mobile-bills.

Comparing the average of postpaid consumer bills with T-Mobile vs. Verizon and AT&T plans. Excludes credits, discounts, and additional/optional charges (e.g., device, equipment, insurance, voicemail, international, overage, certain local charges). Bills sourced from HarrisX's Billing Snapshots product for each billing period between May 2021–December 2025 with data collected from July 2021–December 2025. Data is tabulated and reported monthly with a total sample of approximately 2,575 respondents per wave, reflecting the "most recent, completed bill" of the respondent at time of collection. While HarrisX intends to provide data that is nationally representative, some variance may occur due to sample limitation.

5-Year Price Guarantee means we won’t change the price of talk, text, and 5G smartphone data on our network for at least 5 years as long as you are on an Experience plan. Guarantee also applies to price for data on wearable/tablet/mobile internet lines added to your plan. Your guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn’t restart if you add a line or change plans after that. Taxes & fees, per-use charges, plan add-ons, third-party services, and network management practices aren’t included.

Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots from Q3 ’21 – Q4 ’25 among accounts with 3+ voice lines compared to AT&T and Verizon. Savings exclude discounts, credits, and optional charges. For more details, see harrisx.com/T-Mobile.

Comparing postpaid consumer bills with T-Mobile vs. Verizon and AT&T plans among accounts with 3 or more voice lines. Excludes credits, discounts, and additional/optional charges (e.g., device, equipment, insurance, voicemail, international, overage, certain local charges). Bills sourced from HarrisX's Billing Snapshots product for each billing period between May 2021 – December 2025 with data collected from July 2021 – December 2025. Data is tabulated and reported monthly with a total sample of approximately 2,575 respondents per wave, reflecting the "most recent, completed bill" of the respondent at time of collection. While HarrisX intends to provide data that is nationally representative, some variance may occur due to sample limitation.

Choose the plans you'd like to compare. The number of lines you select may affect plans available for comparison.

You can only check out with a maximum of 5 devices at a time online. Looking to add more than 5 devices to your transaction?

Call 1-800-T-MOBILE

featureName

featureDescription

Hello! Want to stay logged in?

To keep your accounts safe, you'll be automatically logged out in: 

Share your screen while on a call or in store

Get guided support from an Expert in real time

  • For your security, personal info, tabs, and notifications are automatically hidden.
  • You can stop screen sharing at any time.
  • Experts can only see what’s on T-Mobile.com.
  • Don’t use screen share while driving or in any situation where it's unsafe to focus on your screen.

By clicking 'Accept and continue,' you are consenting to allow the Expert to view your screen for assisted navigation. This session may be recorded. To learn more, please visit the  T-Mobile Privacy Notice.

Next: Generate a code to share with your Expert

Share this code with your Expert

code

Once your code has been successfully entered by your Expert, this window will close and continue to the session.

Allow screen sharing with your Expert?

Personal and sensitive data is hidden for your security and privacy.

End your session?

Ending your session will stop sharing your screen, but will not end your call.

Your session has ended

Your screen is no longer being shared with your Expert.

You are already in an active session

Your code has expired

Generate a new one to share with your Expert.
